# Gold Hands Miami — Professional Handyman Services

> Gold Hands Miami is a fully insured handyman service company based in Sunny Isles Beach, Florida, serving the entire Miami-Dade County area.

## Business Summary
- **Name:** Gold Hands Miami
- **Type:** Professional Handyman & Home Repair Services
- **Location:** 201 178th Dr, Sunny Isles Beach, FL 33160
- **Service Area:** Miami-Dade County — Miami, Miami Beach, Coral Gables, Brickell, Doral, Hialeah, Sunny Isles Beach, Aventura, Kendall, Homestead
- **Phone:** +1 (786) 708-1278
- **Email:** handymangoldhands@gmail.com
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM, Saturday 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM
- **Insurance:** Fully insured (General Liability), all technicians background-checked
- **Website:** https://goldhandsmia.com

## Services & Starting Prices
1. **General Handyman Services** — from $79 | $80/hr (shelving, repairs, maintenance)
   → https://goldhandsmia.com/general-handyman.html
2. **TV Mounting** — from $89 (wall-mount, cable management, any TV size, any wall type)
   → https://goldhandsmia.com/tv-mounting.html
3. **Furniture Assembly** — from $99 (IKEA, Wayfair, Amazon — all brands)
   → https://goldhandsmia.com/furniture-assembly.html
4. **Drywall Repair** — from $149 (holes, cracks, water damage, texture matching)
   → https://goldhandsmia.com/drywall-repair.html
5. **Painting (Interior & Exterior)** — from $299 (accent walls, full rooms, exteriors)
   → https://goldhandsmia.com/painting.html
6. **Light Fixture & Ceiling Fan Installation** — from $79 (code-compliant)
   → https://goldhandsmia.com/light-fixture.html
7. **Smart Home Installation** — from $99 (thermostats, doorbells, cameras, locks)
   → https://goldhandsmia.com/smart-home.html
8. **Minor Plumbing** — from $99 (faucets, toilets, garbage disposal, fixtures)
   → https://goldhandsmia.com/plumbing.html
9. **Minor Electrical** — from $79 (outlets, switches, GFCI upgrades)
   → https://goldhandsmia.com/electrical.html

## Key Facts
- 2,000+ jobs completed across Miami-Dade County
- 4.9/5 rating with 200+ reviews
- Same-day service available
- Free estimates for all services
- 100% satisfaction guarantee
- All technicians are background-checked and insured
- Service available in English and Spanish
- No hidden fees — upfront pricing before work begins

## How to Book
- Call: (786) 708-1278
- Email: handymangoldhands@gmail.com
- Website contact form: https://goldhandsmia.com/#contact

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: What areas do you serve?
A: All of Miami-Dade County including Miami, Miami Beach, Coral Gables, Brickell, Doral, Hialeah, Sunny Isles Beach, Aventura, Kendall, Homestead, and surrounding areas.

Q: Are your technicians insured?
A: Yes. We carry full General Liability insurance and every technician passes a background check.

Q: Do you offer same-day service?
A: Yes. Call before noon at (786) 708-1278 for best same-day availability.

Q: What is your pricing?
A: Standard rate is $80/hour with a 2-hour minimum. Many services have flat-rate pricing starting from $79. Free estimates with no hidden fees.

Q: Do you guarantee your work?
A: Yes. All work comes with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.
